case_title: HERMAN PAK HOI POON ET AL VS. GERALD PHILIP WOODARD

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO NOV-28-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-26-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
